rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors.

rows.description: Computus Rectoris a 2do die Novembris A.D. 1859 ad eundem diem revolutum A.D. 1860
rows.notes: Visual verification shows 'Rectoris', '2do', 'eundem', 'revolutum' and 'A.D. 1860'. Correcting minor transcription errors from both candidates. Claude-haiku was closer.
Visual verification confirms 'Recepta' as in claude-haiku's extraction.
Claude-haiku disqualified due to 'amount_shillings': 30, which violates the shillings >= 20 hard rule. Gpt-5-mini's description and values are visually confirmed.

Claude-haiku effectively missed this distinct row, conflating parts of its description with the previous entry. Gpt-5-mini's extraction is accurate based on visual verification. The description 'Andrews 4 do. on do.' is clear with '30' in the pounds column.
Amounts agree between candidates. Visual verification confirms 'Divd.' over 'Dic'd' for the description.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description and all amounts (1308/6/7). Claude-haiku significantly misread the pounds (13 instead of 1308), shillings (8 instead of 6) and description ('Cotty. Burrar [payment] Sorer forms').

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description ('Do. do. do.') and all amounts (1986/0/7). Claude-haiku misread the description ('8v. N. [?] 8d'), pounds (19), shillings (8), pence (6), and incorrectly added a fraction.
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description ('Deans Fees') and pounds value (77). Claude-haiku misread description ('Deano Peed') and pounds (17).

rows.description: Divd. on Mr Jones consols recd Mint '58
rows.notes: Amounts agree between candidates. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description ('Divd. on Mr Jones consols recd Mint '58') over claude-haiku's ('Die in 8d Jones consid in paid 5S').

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description ('New Building Fund. Aut (Closed)') and all amounts (154/13/9). Claude-haiku misread the description ('New Ruilding Fund. tint Clear'), pounds (15), and pence (7).

rows.description: Late Building Fund. not carried to a/c etc
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description ('Late Building Fund not carried to a/c etc') and all amounts (47/1/-). Claude-haiku misread the description ('Late Building Fund. Mortgage [?]'), pounds (4), shillings (7), and incorrectly added a pence value (1).
Amounts agree between candidates. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description ('Dr. Richards Divinity Prize') over claude-haiku's ('S: Beckand. Decently Prize').
Amounts agree between candidates. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description ('Hope Rent Miss Jones Share') over claude-haiku's ('Kipto Rent: Maq. Jones Share').
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description ('Sixteen per cent on Rents') and pounds value (738). Claude-haiku misread description ('Sylteen he [/] ent on Rents') and pounds (7).

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's amounts (332/10/-). Corrected 'Master' to 'Masters' in gpt-5-mini's description based on visual, and 'Colby' is accurate. Claude-haiku misread the description ('Composition to Cotes by Masters'), pounds (3), shillings (3), and incorrectly added pence (2).

rows.description: Overplus Room Rent Xmas 1858 & Do 1859. Rates
rows.notes: Amounts agree between candidates. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description ('Overplus Room Rent Xmas 1858 & do 1859 Rates') over claude-haiku's ('Disposer Room Rent & Klines 1858 & Do 1859. hate').

rows.description: Repayment of money borrowed by Rath from Cantion Fund (Principal £30 Interest £7.4.5)
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description and values. It correctly identified and summed the embedded principal and interest amounts. Claude-haiku misread the description ('Repayment of Monies Borrowed by hater from Churchek Fund') and pounds value (39), and did not explicitly note embedded amounts.
Amounts agree between candidates. Visual verification confirms 'True' over 'Free' in the description.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's amounts (1910/19/8) and interpretation of 'Consols'. Corrected 'Lanthr' to 'Lantern' in gpt-5-mini's description based on image. Claude-haiku misread 'Consols' as 'Carrots' and had significantly incorrect pounds (19) and shillings (10) values.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's amount (1 pound). Corrected description from 'Key' to 'Keys'. Claude-haiku misread the description ('4 am mend Keys') and placed the '1' in shillings instead of pounds.
Amounts agree between candidates. Visual verification confirms 'Allnutt' (gpt-5-mini) over 'Allnnett' (claude-haiku). Corrected gpt-5-mini's 'Barrow' to 'Burrar' based on image.

Amounts agree between candidates. Visual verification confirms 'Sub Rector repayment Instructed (choir)'. Corrected gpt-5-mini's 'Instruction Choir' for better accuracy. Claude-haiku misread 'Sub' as 'het' and truncated 'choir' to 'hoi'.
Amounts agree between candidates. Visual verification confirms there is no descriptive text next to the total, hence an empty string for description.
